sections.title: 1. General Provisions
content: This Cookie Policy explains how the GoTiva website uses cookies and similar technologies to ensure the proper functioning of the website and improve the user experience.
By using the website, the User agrees to the use of cookies in accordance with this Policy.
This Policy supplements the Privacy Policy and applies to all visitors of the website.

sections.title: 2. What Are Cookies
content: Cookies are small text files stored on a User's device when visiting a website.
Cookies allow a website to remember certain information about a User's actions and preferences for a period of time.
In addition to cookies, similar data storage technologies may be used, including localStorage and sessionStorage.

sections.title: 3. What Data We Store
content: The website may store technical settings necessary for the proper operation of the user interface.
In particular, the User's selected language preference may be stored to automatically display the website in the preferred language during future visits.
The website does not use cookies to store sensitive information such as passwords or payment details.

sections.title: 4. Purposes of Using Cookies
content: Ensuring the proper operation of the website and its individual features.
Saving user preferences and settings.
Improving the usability of the website.
Enhancing website performance and stability.
Ensuring the proper functioning of integrations with third-party services.

sections.title: 5. Third-Party Services
content: The website may use third-party services, including Google Maps and other tools required to provide information and functionality.
Such services may use their own cookies and data storage technologies in accordance with their own policies and privacy practices.
The Company does not control the use of cookies by third-party services.

sections.title: 6. Cookie Management
content: Most web browsers allow Users to manage cookies through their browser settings.
Users may delete previously stored cookies or completely disable their use.
Disabling cookies may result in certain website features functioning improperly.

sections.title: 7. Changes to This Policy
content: The Company reserves the right to modify this Cookie Policy at any time.
The updated version of the Policy will be published on the website and becomes effective upon publication.
Users are encouraged to periodically review the current version of this document.

sections.title: 8. Contact Information
content: If you have any questions regarding the use of cookies, you may contact us at: info@gotiva.pro.
The current version of the Cookie Policy is available at: https://gotour.pro/cookie-policy.
